report_name: CYFIRMA Discovers New BARADAI Ransomware Strain Targeting Windows Systems Across Multiple Sectors

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: BARADAI ransomware encrypts files on local and network drives, appending a unique extension to render them inaccessible.

attack_patterns.name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Registry Run Keys / Startup Folder
attack_patterns.description: BARADAI establishes persistence by creating an autorun entry in the 'HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run' registry key.

attack_patterns.name: Modify Registry
attack_patterns.description: The BARADAI malware manipulates registry paths under HKCU\SOFTWARE to store data and potentially modify internet settings and policy keys for defense evasion.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: BARADAI is associated with techniques to inhibit system recovery, such as deleting Volume Shadow Copies using vssadmin, to prevent easy restoration of encrypted files.

malware.name: BARADAI
malware.description: A new file-encrypting ransomware strain that targets Windows systems, encrypts local and network files, and drops a ransom note with contact instructions.

identities.name: Education Sector
identities.description: The education sector was identified as one of the industries targeted by the BARADAI ransomware.

identities.name: Manufacturing Sector
identities.description: The manufacturing sector was identified as one of the industries targeted by the BARADAI ransomware.

identities.name: Retail Sector
identities.description: The retail sector was identified as one of the industries targeted by the BARADAI ransomware.

identities.name: Logistics Sector
identities.description: The logistics sector was identified as one of the industries targeted by the BARADAI ransomware.

indicators.name: BARADAI Persistence via Registry Run Key
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: BARADAI Ransomware Persistence via Run Key
id: 2b1a9c8d-4e5f-4a3b-8c7d-6e5f4a3b2c1d
status: experimental
description: Detects modification of the HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run registry key, a technique used by BARADAI ransomware for persistence.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/outofband/weekly-intelligence-report-08-may-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-08
tags:
  - attack.t1547.001
  - attack.persistence
level: high
logsource:
  category: registry_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetObject|contains: '\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run'
    EventType: 'SetValue'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation or modification of registry values in the CurrentVersion\Run key, a method used by BARADAI for persistence.

indicators.name: BARADAI Ransomware File Encryption
indicators.pattern:
title: BARADAI Ransomware File Extension Detected
id: 9e8f7d6c-5b4a-4c3d-2b1a-0f9e8d7c6b5a
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of files with the '.baradai' extension, which is indicative of BARADAI ransomware activity.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/outofband/weekly-intelligence-report-08-may-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-08
tags:
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.impact
level: critical
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.baradai'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects files being created or renamed with the .baradai extension, a strong indicator of an active BARADAI ransomware infection.

indicators.name: Ransom Note Creation
indicators.pattern:
title: Ransom Note File Creation
id: 1a2b3c4d-5e6f-7a8b-9c0d-1e2f3a4b5c6d
status: experimental
description: Detects the creation of files with common ransom note names, a hallmark of ransomware like BARADAI.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/outofband/weekly-intelligence-report-08-may-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-08
tags:
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - 'ransom_note.txt'
      - 'readme.txt'
      - 'decrypt_me.txt'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the creation of files with common ransom note names, such as ransom_note.txt, which is a common behavior for ransomware like BARADAI.

indicators.name: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
id: f8a1b2c3-d4e5-f6a7-b8c9-d0e1f2a3b4c5
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common ransomware technique to inhibit system recovery.
references:
  - https://www.cyfirma.com/outofband/weekly-intelligence-report-08-may-2026/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-08
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.defense_evasion
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a technique used by ransomware to prevent file recovery.

relationships.target_name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Registry Run Keys / Startup Folder
